entry.title: 使用Business Application Studio开发SAP Build Work Zone插件
entry.content:
SAP Build Work Zone是BTP上最新的企业门户平台服务，通过Work Zone，企业可以更好的配置企业应用统一入口。与SAP Portal类似，Work Zone底层也是基于SAP Fiori Launchpad，所以Work Zone的插件开发，利用的就是Fiori Luanchpad的插件开发技术。

与On premise系统中的SAP Fiori Launchpad一样，通过插件的开发，开发人员可以扩展SAP Fiori Launchpad的基本功能，可以在SAP Fiorilaunchpad中添加自定义代码，在页面上添加新的元素等。

Fiori Luanchpad中的插件(Shell plugin)开发使用SAPUI5开发技术，SAP Business Application Studio作为开发平台。本文会展示如何开发、打包、部署Shell Plugin插件以及如何并在Work Zone中配置。

准备工作：请在SAP BTP中创建以下服务，并分配用户权限。

  • SAP Business Application Studio
  • SAP Build Workzone/ SAP Portal/ SAP BTP Fiori Launchpad

1. SAP BAS开发环境准备

打开SAP BTP中的BAS服务，创建SAP Fiori的开发空间。

 

 

2.BAS中开发插件

Shell Plugin应用本质上是一个MTA中的Freestyle的Fiori应用。所以与Fiori应用开发一样，需要创建MTA工程，添加Managed Approuter等。未来可以在MTA中添加CAP、Nodejs或者JAVA等后端程序，并连接SAP HANA Cloud, SAP Event Mesh等服务实现复杂需求。本文仅展示如何使用模板创建Fiori应用，不会涉及到后端程序。

具体步骤如下：

选择 "New Project From Template"并选择"SAP Fiori Application"模板

选择Basic模板，并填入所有参数

Data Source：None

设置Viewname(本文中的开发不涉及的到view和controller，所有的开发都在componentjs中进行)

设置应用基本信息，并勾选Add deployment configuration以及Add FLP configuration。

部署target选择CF环境。

设置 Semantic Object为Shell，Action为plugin。

完成设置，创建mta工程成功，webapp为Fiori应用所在文件夹，mta.yaml文件为mta工程的描述文件。

修改Fiori应用Manifest文件，添加Shell Plugin参数：修改类型为component，添加hideLauncher，添加flp类型，请参考文档：adding-shell-plugin 

添加代码，添加自定义menu等。自定义代码需要添加在component.js中，本文自定义代码实现两个功能：

代码可参考SAP官方github SAP-samples 

  1. 当用户打开workzone时，弹出对话框显示自定义消息
  2. 在Fiori launchpad的表头中添加自定义button。

获取ushell的render对象

在component.js的init方法中添加自定义button 以及dialog。

代码开发完成后，将mta工程打包并发布到BTP CF环境中。

在mta.yaml文件上右键打开菜单，选择Build MTA Project

打包完成后，选择mta_archives中的mta文件右键打开菜单选择 Deploy MTA archive，将工程部署到BTP中

部署结束后，在BTP中可以看到创建的instance以及Shell plugin 程序

Workzone配置插件

打开workzone的site配置页面

 

channel manager页面刷新 HTML5 apps

content manager页面中的content explorer，选择HTML5 app 

 

 

在content explorer中可以看到刚部署的Shell plugin 应用，注意确认应用type为shell plugin，选择然后点击add添加应用

回到content manager，并将开发的应用添加到预定义好的everyone角色中。

workzone配置完成，现在可以打开workzone测试！

打开workzone的site 可以看到，我们添加的dialog已经显示出来，并且在左上角添加了我们的自定义button。

打开F12，代码已经加载成功。

 

恭喜你，插件开发成功！

entry.title: Re: SAP Business By Design Output Management - part 2
entry.content:
Hi! Thank you for the post, it has been very helpful!

I have a question regarding multiple output channels. Is there a possibility to send out Customer Invoices with e-mail and simultaneously to external system? The requirement is that the customer needs the invoice to go to external service provider + PDF to email at the same time. Right now the output channel selection lets you choose multiple output channels for one customer but only the first one in the list is used. 

It means that if i make 2 entries to the Customer Invoice output channel rule:
1. External System
2. E-mail

It only uses the external system for output. Is there a workaround for this or is this normal behavior?

Thank you! 

Kind regards,

Siim

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 2 - Formulas
entry.content: Hash 8fc7c7f7014e037660ba59a598c679640472c6a5666a1d42020e6da66d782eba

entry.title: Connecting SAP CAP with SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have a question and hope you can help me. We currently have an SAP CAP application and would like to monitor it via SAP Cloud ALM. Do you have any idea how we can connect the SAP CAP application with the SAP CALM to start monitoring? So far we have created a service key in the CALM subaccount and set up a destination from the SAP CAP application in the SAP CAP Subaccount. Can you tell me how I should proceed?

Thanks in advance for your assistance!

 

Best regards,

Barc

entry.title: Re: SAP Fioriにおけるクリックの制御について
entry.content: リプライありがとうございます。 sap.ui.getCore().byId('ID') で要素取得できそうなため、この方向で進めてみようと思います。ご助力いただきありがとうございました。

entry.title: Re: SAP Business ByDesign Output Management - part 1
entry.content:
Hi! Thank you for the post, it has been very helpful!

I have a question regarding multiple output channels. Is there a possibility to send out Customer Invoices with e-mail and simultaneously to external system? The requirement is that the customer needs the invoice to go to external service provider + PDF to email at the same time. Right now the output channel selection lets you choose multiple output channels for one customer but only the first one in the list is used. 

It means that if i make 2 entries to the Customer Invoice output channel rule:
1. External System
2. E-mail

It only uses the external system for output. Is there a workaround for this or is this normal behavior?

Thank you! 

Kind regards,

Siim

entry.title: Issue with lead distribution rule assignment logic
entry.content:
Is experts can any one help this issue we set some rules in our c4c tenant some rules or work fine some or not working 

We have created following lead distribution rules 

Lead distribution rule 

Seq number :313

Operator:equal 

Campaign Name : Test campaign 

Owner:-

Sequence no:312

Operator : include 

Campaign names: EAME 11,id1142,

Owner:-

During testing it we observed that equal to working fine but include Operator not working fine  based on the rule owner data automatically need to fetch but it is not fetching include Operator 

Regards 

Rk

entry.title: Modify Query about sales order
entry.content:
Dear Team

I have a query as below which is showing list of Sales Orders with project code and open amount.

I want to modify this query to add 2 more columns i.e Sales Employee name and Estimated Profit (AED).

Estimated Profit (AED) is uder defined field in Sales Order.

kindly help to modify this query.

 

SELECT distinct(T0.[DocNum]), T0.[CANCELED], T0.[DocStatus], T0.[DocDate], T0.[CardName],T1.Project,Sum(T1.[LineTotal]) as 'Gross Total',
Sum(T1.[LineVat])'Tax Amount', Sum(T1.[LineTotal]+T1.[LineVat]) 'Total', Sum ((T1.[OpenQty] * T1.[Price]) * (CASE WHEN T0.DocCur = 'AED' THEN 1 ELSE T1.[Rate] END)) As 'Open Value' FROM ORDR T0 INNER JOIN RDR1 T1 ON T0.DocEntry = T1.DocEntry INNER JOIN OCTG T2 ON T0.GroupNum = T2.GroupNum WHERE (T1.[PROJECT] >= [%0] and T1.[PROJECT] <=[%1]) and T0.[CANCELED] ='N' GROUP BY T0.[DocNum], T0.[CANCELED], T0.[DocStatus], T0.[DocDate], T0.[CardName], T1.[Project]

entry.content:
Hi,

This is Sayan Das. Now I am Working in SAP APO. I want to explore SAP IBP and other modules of SAP SCM.

entry.title: Re: LoadLibrary for observer failed SAP B1 DI API
entry.content:
Hi Bryan-SG,

Have you installed the DI API from the same Patch package that you have installed on SAP Business One Server?

Make sure that your program is targetting to the correct DI API. Set the Target Platform as x64 and test again.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: SAP Hybris Marketing: Customer Data Upload
entry.content:
Hi SauMaris,

I am using the ABAP Editor for my ABAP program, and my data source is an Excel file. Essentially, I want to create an uploader to transfer a large volume of data from the Excel file and upload it to my SAP standard table. I would like to know if there are any BAPIs or function modules available that can create customers and their interactions through an Excel file upload in SAP Hybris Marketing On-Prem.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hello @Rajarshi welcome to SAP Community. I would like to encourage you to join the Kolkata Group. It's a location based group to connecting local community members. There will also be an SAP Inside Track next week on April 27. Register here and find more information about the event in the Kolkata Group.

entry.title: Re: The data action couldn't run because of a problem wit...
entry.content:
Start small. Too many configurations going on. 

Remove Configuration at the top (ie. CONFIG). Run it for default members/hierarchies/etc. Fix the default date to run 1 month/day/lowest granularity at a time. Same with cost center, select one cost center. Not sure what cost center hierarchy you are running on because it makes a difference.  The default hierarchy will be used unless specified otherwise. 

 

Try to write 1 or 100 or 1000 to the cost center dimension whose work breakdown structure (wbs) attribute responsibility cost center actually exists.  After that, you can focus on the source value to pull and write to the destination.  

Hint: I have never run an open RESULTLOOKUP() on a go-live project.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hello @JSakth welcome to SAP Community. Did you notice already the location groups here in SAP Community? There is one in Chennai and the purpose is to connect local community members. Join that group and get to know the Chennai Community!

entry.title: Re: Welcome to our SAP Learning Group moderated by SAP Learning Experts
entry.content: Happy to join this forum. I need some expert guidance from people who have completed the E_S4CPE_2023 certification. I have completed the learning journey recommended by SAP, but still could not able to clear the certification. Is it some additional materials i need to learn and practice? Pls guide.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to obtain the monthly SalesOrder amount
entry.content:
hi Kyamanaka,

You can find released cds views for sales here (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c0c54048d35849128be8e872df5bea6d/87fae757dc3bf032e10000000a441470.html?q=history%20sales%20order%20cds&locale=en-US) to check if there is a cds view can fulfill your requirements. but per my finding there is no views of change history of Sales Order.

Also please kindly check these APPs which can display Changes in Objects in Sales

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/b25a3abf5ac740bcb56b91717f37b7c1.html?q=display%20change%20log&locale=en-US

 

 

Best regards,

Angela

entry.title: Re: Hi Viewers,vendor master data when create contract missing partner functions OA and VN
entry.content: Sounds like a data management issue for master data alignment. Are you asking if and when ERP master data is created that you want to align to SAC?

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hello @sdelamott wow, that's been a long time! Impressive! 

My journey started in May 2000, so I am close to the next "anniversary" 😉

Where are you from in Germany? I would like to encourage you to find the most closest location group for you here in SAP Community. For Europe, including Germany, search here. Don't forget to "join" the group if you found one closeby where you live! It's a great opportunity to connect with other local community members 🙂

entry.title: Error in SUM: MAIN_SHDPREPUT/RUN_RSPTBFIL_PREP_DIST_PREPUT
entry.content:
Hi experts.

We are migrating from R/3 on HanaDB to S/4 on a test system and are in the following position in the SUM:

 

Checks after phase MAIN_SHDPREPUT/RUN_RSPTBFIL_PREP_DIST_PREPUT were negative!

 
Last generated error message:
Single errors (code <= 😎 found in logfile 'PHASE_RUN.ELG'
 

Error: Batchjob RSPTBFIL_PREPREPUT on shadow system failed.
The following errors were detected in the log files:

# Find the detailed information in log 'RSPTB_PREP_DIST_PREPUT.BS3':
4 ETG057 Job name ......: CL_PTBFILL_PREP_DIST_PREPUT Component: BC-UPG-TLS-TLA (Upgrade Tools for ABAP)
4 ETG010 UPG Parameter MIG2NDDB_TYPE read. Value: ''
4 ETG012 Reduced Distmodes is set to value 'X'
4 ETG011 .
4 ETG011 +-- ORG_DESTINFO --+
4 ETG010 Timestamp: 15.04.2024 14:12:15 [ORG_DESTINFO]
2EETG012 [ORG_DESTINFO] Erroneous state for object SCRR_IUUC_STATS
2EETG012 [ORG_DESTINFO] Erroneous state for object CRR_ACCESS_PLAN
2EETG012 [ORG_DESTINFO] Erroneous state for object CRR_DELIM_FIELD
2EETG012 [ORG_DESTINFO] Erroneous state for object CRR_MDS_SOBJ
2EETG012 [ORG_DESTINFO] Erroneous state for object CRR_MDS_SOBJK
2EETG012 [ORG_DESTINFO] Erroneous state for object CRRTASKCOUNT
2EETG012 [ORG_DESTINFO] Erroneous state for object CRRTASKHIST
2EETG012 [ORG_DESTINFO] Erroneous state for object CRR4TABLES
2EETG012 [ORG_DESTINFO] Erroneous state for object CRRERROR
2EETG012 [ORG_DESTINFO] Erroneous state for object CRRPARAMETERS

...skipped 7 more lines.

 

When i check (f.e.) CRRERROR in SE14 on shadow instance, i get the information:

 

 

No active runtime object exists

Message No. DD_DBAL_CONST_CHK800

 

 

When i try to activate the table in SE11:

Errors occurred during generation

No inconsistencies found

Message No. AD399

 

I can't find any references to this error. Can someone help me?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hi @Phil3 welcome to SAP Community! I would like to encourage you to subscribe to the event board "SAP Stammtisch". This event type is a casual coming together and purpose is to stay connected in the local community. Maybe there is one SAP Stammtisch nearby Düsseldorf? Find it out and leave your RSVP if you are going to join or not! Here you can also find more about the event in general.

entry.title: Error Occured while genrating ABAP Repository Objects for Database Table
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

while genrating ABAP Repository Objects for Database Table for CDS RAP 

I am getting below error

Error : An exception of type 'CX_SY_ITAB_LINE_NOT_FOUND' occurred, that was not caught anywhere in the call hierarchy. It was not handled locally or declared using a RAISING clause.

I have maintained some data in those table

Kindly suggest to solve this

#ABAP #ADT #ABAP Cloud   #SAP BTP, ABAP environment   #ABAP Connectivity

entry.title: Re: Delete or Clean Error Messages in SAC Story
entry.content: Take a look at the story.  Is the live-connection model the only model used in the story?  the data lock feature is available on the planning model/import model so you can't input data into a model.  Maybe there is a planning model that is being used in the story that you are using that has data locks enabled.  Other than this, try creating a new story and see if you are receiving an error still.

entry.title: Employee synch to Business Partner
entry.content:
Hi experts: We are going to do system conversion from ECC 6 to S/4 HANA, We have employee vendors in an account group , but there is no personnel number updated in Vendor master (LFB1-PERNR is blank) in ECC system. and we plan to using custom BADI to change BP category as person(with vendor role) for those employee vendors (LFB1-PERNR is blank) during CVI in the pre conversion period.

Afther SUM, during post conversion, we will run synchronisation program to synchronize the employee to the same BP(which created in pre conversion with vendor role).

May I know if there is any potential risk for this approach? or we need maintain the personnel number in the vendor master and follow SAP standard BADI to do this?

Best Regards

Kane

entry.title: Query on plateau.com Certificate Renewal notification email
entry.content:
A few users in our organization have received a certificate renewal notification email from SAP CloudSupport Alerts (sapcloudsupport@alerts.ondemand.com) regarding plateau.com Certificate Renewal for Production and Non Production environments. I have a question regarding the recipients of this email: Do they require access to any specific authorization in the SAP Launchpad or SAP for Me account? We would like to identify how the recipients are chosen for this communication so that we can adjust the access in the Launchpad accordingly, to prevent individuals who are not intended to receive this communication from doing so.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Query on plateau.com Certificate Renewal notification...
entry.content:
You can refer the following:
2896942 - How Super Administrators and Cloud Administrators manage Cloud Notifications for other users in CSNS - SAP for Me
2900069 - How S-users can manage their own Cloud Notifications in the CSNS - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Recruiting: New Career Site Job Search and Job Layout
entry.content:
Hi @helenekunz 

the unified data model bring new functionality to JOB LAYOUT. Therefore I'd recommend to first migrate to unified data model before spending effort on Job Layout.

Regarding the overall career site layout there is not much to consider as this is still the same after migration to unified data model.

entry.title: Re: Question about report for Sales in SAP S/4HANA Public...
entry.content:
hi,

It is recommended to create custom reports based on cds views.

Kindly check if cds views below could fulfill your requirements:

I_SalesDocItemPricingElement (https://api.sap.com/cdsviews/I_SALESDOCITEMPRICINGELEMENT)

I_InventoryPriceByKeyDate(https://api.sap.com/cdsviews/I_INVENTORYPRICEBYKEYDATE)

Also cds views for Sales for your reference:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c0c54048d35849128be8e872df5bea6d/87fae757dc3bf032e10000000a441470.html?q=history%20sales%20order%20cds&locale=en-US

 

Best regards,

Angela

entry.title: Re: Hotspot not working when EDIT is active
entry.content:
"but client still wanna try with hotspot."

As you desperately ask for a clickable hotspot field, a trick is to have the hotpot field not editable by default, make it editable when you enter the field by tabulation and make it not editable again when you leave it (still by typing tabulation), but it's a trick and I doubt it will work very well, and you'll spend a lot of time to make it work more or less correctly (if even possible).

A more simple solution which will always work, is to have a toggle button to make the column of hotspots editable or not editable.

entry.title: Re: Hotspot not working when EDIT is active
entry.content: If something does not work as you expect, you should check the SAP notes or contact SAP support.

entry.title: SAP Business One-copy item master data latest attachment to PO line
entry.content:
SAP Business One

Is there anyway, we can configure to copy item master data the latest attachment (from attachment tab) to the PO line, when the PO created, either the PO created from base document or manually.

entry.title: Re: Hotspot not working when EDIT is active
entry.content: The hotspot field is not editable.

entry.title: Re: Exploring SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI: A Comprehensive Review
entry.content:
Hi Brian, sounds like you're dealing with SAP GUI shortcuts generated via a portal or something similar. These shortcuts typically achieve SSO with trusted systems. This SSO method was once popular for easy access to SICF services (ABAP Web AS) or launching SAP GUI via shortcuts. However, due to various operational and security drawbacks, as well as domain restrictions associated with the use of SAP Login Tickets, this approach has fallen out of favor.

SAP SE itself has been recommending for over eight years, as documented in SAP Note 2117110, the adoption of standardized SSO technologies such as Kerberos/SPNEGO, X.509, or SAML 2.0. The note also highlights limited support and the inadequacy of technical security standards of the cryptographic methods used. The cookie mechanism carries the risk of unauthorized data transmission interception. Specifically, a copy of the SAP login ticket could be used to gain unauthorized access to protected resources through hijacking/replay attacks.

Given the evolution of security technologies and best practices, it might be a good time to reassess and update your SSO strategy. To tackle this issue, you should first ensure that SNC (Secure Network Communications) is activated and correctly configured, including SNC User Mapping, etc. You can also pass SNC parameters via the sapgui.exe or work with environment variables to integrate a secure SNC connection directly into your links, depending on how those links are generated. For more details, maybe check out here? 
Cheers Colt

entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP Datasphere Version 2024.8 — Apr 11, 2024
entry.content:
Great Blog!

Finally, one year later, we can schedule Replication Flows, containing Text CDS Views in Full mode. 😀

entry.title: Re: SAP exception messages difference between MD04/table...
entry.content:
Hello @Xiaoguang 

First, you mustn't compare exceptions in the MDTB table with stock/requirements list. MDTB stores MRP lists. Even though they look very similar MRP lists and stock/requirements lists are two fundamentally different functionalities.

Second, your current stock is zero and is below the safety stock of 1. Therefore you definitely need the POItem and you need to execute it as fast as possible. So the exceptions in MD04 are correct. You should not cancel the POItem as the exception 20 in MD_STOCK_REQUIREMENTS_LIST_API advises. To me it looks like a bug in MD_STOCK_REQUIREMENTS_LIST_API, I would report that to SAP support.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content:

Enhanced the app logic to capture the error output of the Take Photo function to see blank error as this

 

 

Here is the Hash though:  165970781bc86ec1f22afc4294c67ba457f6a60dbb3724a764acab59be5a8cac

entry.title: Re: Prevent users from navigation in Sap analytics cloud...
entry.content: Hi, thanks for your answer. best regards

entry.title: Re: Business Configuration in SAP BTP ABAP Environment (1): Overview and BC Maintenance Apps
entry.content:
Hi Juri, 

the following currency objects are available for upload: V_TCURF Currencies: Translation Ratios, V_TCURN Currencies: Notations, V_TCURR Currency Exchange Rates, V_TCURV Currency Translation Exchange Rate Types, TCURW Usage of Exchange Rate Types. 

They are part of the BPC_EXPERT role template. If you need additional objects for upload added, then please raise a influence request: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#campaign/2911

entry.title: Re: special characters are not getting converted sometimes while Outbound IDOC is triggered from S4
entry.content:
Hi Sandra_Rossi,

Do you mean WE21 port ? There our SAP team has maintained Transaction_RFC port type under which they have RFC pointing to middleware system(SAP PO). Not File Port in WE21. Pls help further on this.

entry.title: Re: Build Work Zone Single logout (SLO) for a multitenant...

entry.title: Re: Horizon Theme and Templates for Stories in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi, 

Thank you for sharing again, it looks great when we import package in our Test sac environment. How can we test theme file in another tenant without transporting package, for example, how can we download theme file, and import it in another tenant, it could let us test Production Story without transportation.

Thank you

entry.title: Proficiency Levels for job role competencies displayed in Career Worksheets
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have a configuration case with the following requirements:

-  Job role competencies

-  Each competency has proficiency levels with specific description

-  Depending on the role, the competency can change the proficiency level

It is possible to display in career worksheet, the proficiency level + associated description? ( we are flexible now to use CoC or TIH).

Thank you for your input.

Alexandra

entry.title: Re: Bind App to hdi-container with specific role or read-...
entry.content: When you are binding a node.js module to a database module, it gets the credential of the related _RT user to connect to the related HDI container. If your concern is that you have several applications that you would like to bind to the same hdi container but with different privileges, the solution is to create intermediate hdi containers, one for each application. Those hdi container would be bind to your main hdi container and you would create synonym to the hana artifacts you want to expose + specific hdbgrants file for each application.

entry.title: Re: Migration and Upgrade from SAP SCM 7.0 EHP3 on Window...
entry.content: Hi Sriram,

entry.title: SAP HANA HDBSQL to execute SQL commands at OS level in background
entry.content:
Hi SAP, we would like to seek for your expertise regarding how we can execute HANASQL command in background via OS level. This is for the preparation of the incoming Online table partition.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA HDBSQL to execute SQL commands at OS level i...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Hope you are doing well.

Just as this guide https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_CLIENT/f1b440ded6144a54ada97ff95dac7adf/6097e699826343d0879244185d680a0d.html?q=background mentioned: SAP HANA HDBSQL imports the commands from the specified file and processes them in the background, the SQL will not be canceled and will continue running in database after hdbsql is somehow terminated.

However you may not see any output after exit hdbsql, even if you have redirected the output to a file using -o command. If output values a lot, hdbsql needs to be run in background. Following is one of the solutions to achieve that.

Just like any other LINUX program, you may use nohup command to run the hdbsql in background and stop it from being killed when the session is terminated. Here is the format:

****************
nohup hdbsql -n <hostname>:<port> -u <username> -p <password> -i <instance_number> -m <<EOF > <a file name where output of the program will be put in> 2>&1 &

<put your sqls here, can be multiple lines, don’t forget semicolons>

EOF
****************

Also there is an example for you to better understand the format:

****************
nohup hdbsql -n server:30013 -u SYSTEM -p PASSWORD -i 00 -m <<EOF > output.txt 2>&1 &

Select * from DUMMY;

Select * from DUMMY;

EOF

****************

Best Regards,

Jay

 

=========================================================

Get answers quickly and conveniently! Try our brand new support services:

Expert Chat

Schedule an Expert

Guided Answers

=========================================================

entry.title: Re: Add components to production order using FM bapi_alm_...
entry.content: Hi Gurus, any update on this....need your kind help

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance: "Reverse" Outdated supplier status
entry.content: Hi @Paulo_Pinto , here is some information on your question. Right now, once the status "outdated" is set, this is currently not reversable.  As I understand it (but I haven't personally tested this), recreation is only possible after the ILM retention period has passed and the Supplier Material has been physically deleted. There is currently a ticket open on this issue and a development team is working on this.

entry.title: Re: Best Practices for using current SAP APM Rules for Condition Monitoring
entry.content:
Hi Marcus,

this is an excellent blog.

Question, do you by any chance know, or know somebody who knows, is there a blog or a document or webpage from SAP which explains and confirms that:

SAP Internet of Things (SAP IoT) | SAP Help Portal  

has replaced the retired

SAP IoT services for SAP BTP for the Cloud Foundry Environment | SAP Help Portal

The Product Availability Matrix doesn't seem to have any information, nor does the SAP Discovery Center.

Is SAP Internet of Things (SAP IoT) | SAP Help Portal the IoT Roadmap Product from SAP for the next/coming years ?

Thanks and best regards,

Andy Silvey.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Elements: Object Page - @UI.facet Type #COL...
entry.content:
Well, finally found the answer to this issue in this brilliant blog from Pawan Kesari: CDS-Fiori Elements – Object Page Facets

Below is the reason mentioned by Pawan in his blog above and he's spot on:

 

I recalled that I had as well created the Project before adding the Facets in Metadata Extension file and found this:

After deleting manually, it works. Thanks to Pawan: My Experiments with ABAP

entry.title: Re: Migration and Upgrade from SAP SCM 7.0 EHP3 on Window...
entry.content: Hi Sriram, many thanks for your feedback. One more question: 1. on your step 2., do you mean that if we upgrade our DB2 from source 10.05.0003 to target version 11.5, together with SAP Kernel update from source 7.42 to target 7.54, we can run SAP SCM 7.0 EHP3 system on Windows 2019 OS, as a temporary step before upgrade to SAP SCM 7.0 EHP4, is it correct? https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/pam?hash=s%3DEHP3%2520FOR%2520SAP%2520SCM%25207.0%26o%3Dmost_viewed%257Cdesc%26st%3Dl%26rpp%3D20%26page%3D1%26pvnr%3D01200314690900005017%26pt%3Dt%257CPLTFRM%26ainstnr%3D01200314694900015203%26fclfilter%3DG2%257CWINDOWS%2520FOR%2520X86_64%253BG1%257CDB2%2520LUW%252064-BIT%253BS%257CSAP%2520KERNEL%25207.54%252064-BIT%2520UNICODE 2. what about our source Livecache version 7.9.08.38 of SAP SCM system? Is it still compliant with target Windows 2019 OS, or do we need to upgrade it as well? From PAM it seems like we would need to upgrade it to new target version on Windows 2019: https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/pam?hash=s%3DEHP3%2520FOR%2520SAP%2520SCM%25207.0%26o%3Dmost_viewed%257Cdesc%26st%3Dl%26rpp%3D20%26page%3D1%26pvnr%3D01200314690900005017%26pt%3Dt%257COS%26ainstnr%3D01200314694900015204%26fclfilter%3DG1%257CWINDOWS%2520FOR%2520X86_64 Ref. also SAP Note 919224. Thanks a lot in advance.

entry.title: Restrict Remit To field in BN Invoice
entry.content:
My client utilises SAP Business Network & SAP Ariba SLP. They have encountered situations where their suppliers are updating their banking details in the Remit ID on the Business Network instead of in their SLP profile.

Is there a way to restrict these fields in BN?

Or Is there a way to map the remit to information in BN to update in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud?

SAP Business Network for Procurement and SAP Business Network for Supply Chain SAP Business Network for Suppliers SAP Ariba Supplier Lifecycle and Performance SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: Re: How to build SOAP service in SAP Cloud Integration

SOAP is old, heavy and rigid format, use API REST with JSON. 🙂

entry.title: Re: Bind App to hdi-container with specific role or read-...
entry.content: Hi, thank you for the answer. I was hopping for a "cleaner" strategy (like specifying the name of the role somewhere) but I will go with the multiple hdi-containers.

entry.title: Re: Connect Cutomer IAS to our BTP Subaccount using Estra...
entry.content:
Hi @nicorunge @istvanbokor ,

Maybe I'm gonna say a crazy thing. But, it would be technically possible to use an IAS (Let's call it IAS-1) acting as a proxy to another IAS (IAS-2), added as Corporate Identity Provider on IAS-1? Then, on your Aplication on IAS-1 set a condition to redirect authentication to IAS-2?

IAS-1 should be binded to Global Account where your CAP aplication is hosted.

That way, you would have a subaccount trusting your IAS-1 (Added with OIDC proptocol), and IAS-1 relaying authentication to IAS-2.

Regards,

Francisco

Hope that helps.

Christian

entry.title: Re: Get Certified – SAP Build Low-code/No-code Applications and Automations
entry.content:
Hello,

C_LCNC certification was retired end of March. Please refer to this page to understand the certification transformation SAP Certification Transformation | SAP Learning and see this list for recommendations: SAP Certification Recommendation

Best,

Inna

entry.title: Re: Delete or Clean Error Messages in SAC Story
entry.content: Thanks for answer, but the data lock features is coming from BW side (BPC embedded model) and this is fine. What I wanted to know is if it's possible to remove after so many messages appear on the lock screen or handle them somehow so that it doesn't fill the screen with red lock messages for each planning sequence launched. A button triggers 10 sequences, for example, and 10 lock messages appear on the screen for a simple lock.

entry.title: Re: SAP variant configuration and pricing - manual exchan...
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you Fancy.

We need to calculate line item value as similar to S/4 pricing as possible - not just item value but each varcond/element separately. To limit rounding issues comparing to how S/4 will be calculating sales order value later on.

At the end we will be sending rate to S/4 quote - there is a standard mechanism that can handle it and use for calculation.

Thats why we thought about using CPS that will work similar to S/4. And each varcond in CPQ and in S/4 will have same value in foreign currency.

Can we influence each pricing element/varcond with your approach?

 

For now we decided to make a bit different approach anyway to fulfill also parallel business reqs - so make in integration a specific mapping to S/4 only.

entry.title: Re: Delete or Clean Error Messages in SAC Story
entry.content: Thank you, I will try to use this API script... but anyway what I want is for the error messages to be visible, or to somehow group them all in a single container or something, so that it doesn't fill the screen with messages. Thanks again

entry.title: 🇩🇪 SAP CodeJam SAP Fiori elements flexible programming model (Walldorf, Germany)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is about the SAP Fiori elements flexible programming model (FPM). After a quick introduction to UI5, we will dive into the SAP Fiori elements and learn how to build a web application that allows users to browse and order books. Using the FPM, we will customise this SAP Fiori elements application. With this hands-on experience, you will be able to start developing your own SAP Fiori elements applications after this CodeJam.

The content for this SAP CodeJam is still work in progress and will be linked here, once it is ready.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Wednesday 10 July 2024 at the DSAG Geschäftstelle in Walldorf, Germany from 10:00 - 16:00 local time. The language of the event and the content will be English. 

The instructor will be Developer Advocate Nico Schoenteich.

There are essential prerequisites that must be completed by every attendee, before arriving at the event location. They are documented here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/ui5-exercises-codejam/blob/main/chapters/1.00-prep-dev-environment/re....

Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 25 attendees. Register here in the Community Event using the RSVP functionality.

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance: "Reverse" Outdated supplier status
entry.content:
Hi @Michael_Mulder .

Again, thank you for your answer. 

"Right now, once the status "outdated" is set, this is currently not reversable. " well, this is really inconvenient; and more, if one considers the position of the outdated button which is rather easy to click by mistake and the proneness to make errors by users (mainly due to work loads and some distraction).
Hope SAP solves this issue promptly.

Again, thank you.

entry.title: If we added a filter, shouldn't the select query run faster?
entry.content:
Hi Master,

When I run it with only the production plant(werks), the select query runs in a shorter time than when I run it with the production location and material.
How is this possible? Shouldn't the select query run faster when I add material?

 

Thanks.

Can you help here?

entry.title: Re: Migration and Upgrade from SAP SCM 7.0 EHP3 on Window...
entry.content: Hi Marco, 1. You do not need to upgrade the existing source DB system, all the actions you have to perform in the target system with Windows server 2019 with DB2 11.5, your source system does not support DB2 11.5 in Windows server 2008. As per the SAP PAM. 2. Regarding the Live cache you have to upgrade the latest patch which is already mentioned in the SAP Note 919224, on the source system before migrating to the new Windows server 2019. 3. If possible you can perform the steps of any one of the tests or sandbox systems before getting into the live landscapes. Regards SS

entry.title: Empty Result Array Issue in Business Rules Service for Partner Creation Approval Process
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am encountering an issue while configuring the business partner creation approval live process. I am following the official configuration guide and am facing a challenge at the step where I need to enrich the base data using the My Inbox app.

Problem Description: After updating the data in My Inbox and attempting to submit it, the system sends a POST request to the following URL:

https://***process-automation.build.cloud.sap/BPManagement.comsapbpmEnrich/bpmrulesruntime/public/rule/runtime/rest/v2/rule-services

Although the request returns a status 200 (indicating that it has technically succeeded), the resulting data array is unexpectedly empty (Result: []). Here is the snippet of the code handling the response:

Questions:

1. Has anyone else experienced a similar issue with the My Inbox app in process automation environments?
2. Are there any known fixes or workarounds that can ensure the result array is not empty?

I appreciate any guidance or suggestions on how to resolve this. Thank you!

Original value was 1142,59.  New purchase is 1213,71.  This amount should be transferred to new asset.

entry.title: Re: ASUG Philadelphia Chapter Meeting: April 4th, 2024
entry.content: Interesting

entry.title: SAP Datasphere DBADMIN and Data provisioning agent issue (AGENT ADMIN and ADAPTER ADMIN)
entry.content:
Hello all,

in regard to SAP Datasphere and SAP HANA Data Provisioning Agent: 

when we install the provisioning agent and connect the DB User from the Space Administration page to the provisioning agent, we are getting the issue:

Missing privileges for Agent Admin HANA user: S4HC_DATA_MIGRATION#DB_ADMIN [..]Ensure that the system privileges AGENT ADMIN and ADAPTER ADMIN are granted to agent admin HANA user.

How are we to grant these privileges to a Database user? in the SQL console we don't have sufficient privileges to do these grants.

Could not execute 'GRANT AGENT ADMIN TO S4HC_DATA_MIGRATION#SYSTEM' Error: (dberror) [258]: insufficient privilege

Is there a DBADMIN superuser for all Spaces on the Datasphere? Or how do we grant these privileges?

Best regards

T. Durham

entry.title: Re: Make editable a custom field in CS01 or CS02
entry.content:
The  tc_control module (added from note 1313559 doesnt provide enh options)

But if I remenber (from DIMP) there was another module to change SCREEN attributes, in the LOOP WITH CONTROL, look for module field_selection_loop which call a form, so you get some implicit Enh points (and an explicit one?)

entry.title: Re: Building custom app at SAP S/4 public cloud
entry.content: Hi thanks for your reply. The guide is really useful and detailed. In case of on stack (developer extension) it is mentioned that we have to use local released stable APIs, extension points. Is it possible that we develop own service using custom table and publish it as oData (API) and then consume it anywhere?

entry.title: ad-hoc analysis on BW Querys in SAP Analytics Cloud on iOS mobile devices
entry.content:
We have SAC on live data connections to our BW/4 Business Warehouse, and we use the SAP mobile app on devices to access SAC stories and applications.

Is there any way to perform an ad-hoc analysis on BW Queries on iOS mobile devices also, say using the data analyzer?

entry.title: RFC registered program
entry.content:
Dear all,

We have an RFC destination with a gateway registered program which belong to an external server/application.

So, if that external server change the IP address, do we have to re-register the program with rfcexec in our gateway again or SAP will update the IP address and details using the hostname we provided ?

BR

entry.content:
